name: Ground Meat Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground meat, gizzards, heart, and liver until thoroughly cooked.
2. Add seasonings (salt, pepper, garlic powder) and vegetables (onion, green onions, celery) to the pan. Cook until the onions are soft.
3. Mix the dressing according to package directions.
4. Stir in the oysters and any additional ingredients specified on the packaging, such as pecans.
5. Allow the mixture to cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
6. Let the dressing cool before stuffing it into the turkey.
- Note: The dressing mixture should be relatively dry before adding oysters. Oysters will release moisture during cooking, and natural juices from the bird may also contribute to liquid content. Adjust as needed.
